languages.text: "Зачем красть звезду? Ради каких-то больных опытов, которые вы здесь проводили?!"

traits.locale_text: "Зачем красть звезду? Ради каких-то больных опытов, которые вы здесь проводили?!"
"Зачем красть звезду? Ради каких-то больных опытов, которые вы здесь проводили?!"

languages.text: "Why steal the star? Was it for some sick experiment you have been conducting here?!"
languages.original_text: "Зачем красть звезду? Ради каких-то больных опытов, которые вы здесь проводили?!"

traits.locale_text: "Why steal the star? Was it for some sick experiment you have been conducting here?!"
"Why steal the star? Was it for some sick experiment you have been conducting here?!"
"Why steal the star? Was it for some sick experiment you have been conducting here?!"

languages.text: "Warum haben Sie den Stern gestohlen? War es für ein krankes Experiment, das ihr hier durchgeführt habt?!"
languages.original_text: "Why steal the star? Was it for some sick experiment you have been conducting here?!"

languages.text: "Pourquoi voler l'étoile ? C'était pour une expérience malsaine que vous avez menée ici ?!"
languages.original_text: "Why steal the star? Was it for some sick experiment you have been conducting here?!"

languages.text: "为什么要偷星星？是为了你们在这里做的变态实验吗？"
languages.original_text: "Why steal the star? Was it for some sick experiment you have been conducting here?!"

languages.text: "¿Por qué robar la estrella? ¡¿Fue para algún experimento enfermizo que habéis estado llevando a cabo aquí?!"
languages.original_text: "Why steal the star? Was it for some sick experiment you have been conducting here?!"

languages.text: 「なぜ星を盗んだ？何か病的な実験のためか？"
languages.original_text: "Why steal the star? Was it for some sick experiment you have been conducting here?!"

languages.text: "Yıldızı neden çaldın? Burada yürüttüğünüz hastalıklı bir deney için miydi?!"
languages.original_text: "Why steal the star? Was it for some sick experiment you have been conducting here?!"
